mnemonics: UNIX - User-friendly, Portable, and Efficient System
keyPoints: 10.1 Process Synchronization: Keep threads busy and avoid interference by using semaphores, monitors, and mutexes.
10.2 Process Communication: Use pipes, sockets, and shared memory to exchange data between processes.
10.3 File System Organization: Understand the different file system structures, such as directories, files, and hard links.
10.4 File System Operations: Learn about file creation, deletion, renaming, and copying using various commands and functions.
10.5 Job Control: Master the art of controlling processes using signals, background processes, and job control commands.
